brand_style_global: TrailVolt is a premium outdoor / urban-tech / lifestyle backpack brand. Dark navy (#0B1626) and electric mint (#3FFFAB) palette. Modern, clean, aspirational, adventure-ready. Cordura fabric, YKK zippers, Duraflex hardware. Built in Dublin. Used everywhere.

prompts.purpose: Primary hero product image — most important asset on the site
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Core Pack modular backpack — hero product shot
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio photo of a modern black modular backpack with electric mint accents, dramatic dark navy background, magazine-quality lighting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A high-end product photography shot of a premium modular backpack in core black with subtle electric mint accent stitching and hardware. The pack is positioned at a 30-degree 3/4 angle on a dark navy (#0B1626) seamless background. Cinematic rim lighting from the upper left creates sharp definition on the Cordura fabric texture. A soft electric mint glow (#3FFFAB) emanates from behind the pack as if from a distant light source. The pack features visible YKK zipper pulls, ballistic nylon weave, padded shoulder straps, multiple compartment zippers, and subtle magnetic module attachment points on the front face. Camera is at eye level. Depth of field is shallow, background is a smooth dark gradient. Studio quality, sharp, 8K, product photography, no text, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, logo, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, plastic, cheap looking, bright colors, white background unless in variant, people, hands
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is the hero image — it must feel like a luxury gear brand. Think Peak Design, Arc'teryx, or COTOPAXI campaign photography. Not a product thumbnail. A statement.

prompts.purpose: Lifestyle shot for the Everyday 22L line card on the homepage
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L pack in urban commute setting
prompts.short_prompt: Young professional walking through a modern city street in morning light, wearing a premium black modular backpack, Dublin or London aesthetic.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A lifestyle photography shot of a young professional (man or woman, late 20s) walking confidently through a modern urban streetscape that evokes Dublin or London — Georgian brick buildings, clean pavements, morning light. The subject wears smart-casual work attire and carries a premium black modular backpack (22-litre). The shot is from a slight low angle, capturing the subject in motion. Warm early morning golden hour light from the side. Depth of field is medium — subject sharp, city background pleasantly blurred. The image conveys purpose, energy, and a premium daily carry lifestyle. No logos or text visible. Cinematic, editorial style. Aspect ratio 3:2.
prompts.negative_prompt: cartoon, text, logos, watermark, generic stock photo look, overly posed, plastic bag, cheap bag, neon colours, synthetic-looking skin
prompts.brand_style_notes: Convey the Monday commute energy — purposeful, modern, aspirational without being pretentious.

prompts.purpose: Lifestyle shot for the Travel 30L line card — airport / cabin context
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L pack at airport — cabin carry-on
prompts.short_prompt: Sleek black modular travel backpack being placed in an airplane overhead bin, modern terminal architecture in background, clean and confident.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A travel lifestyle photography shot: a premium black 30-litre modular backpack is being placed into an airplane overhead storage bin. The bin is in a clean, modern aircraft cabin. The hand placing the bag is purposeful and confident. Behind the scene, the aircraft interior is in soft focus — premium economy or business class cabin feel. The bag is structured, IATA-compliant in shape, with organised zippers visible. The lighting is bright, clean, slightly cool — the light of travel. No branding text visible on the bag. The shot communicates: this pack handles every airline, every destination. Cinematic, editorial, sharp. 3:2 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: cheap bag, discount airline, messy overhead bin, cartoon, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, overfull bin
prompts.brand_style_notes: Business traveller energy. Premium, reliable, efficient. The pack should look like it's been through 14 countries and still looks sharp.

prompts.purpose: Lifestyle shot for the Trail 28L line card — outdoor hiking context
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L pack on mountain hiking trail
prompts.short_prompt: Hiker wearing a forest green premium modular backpack on a misty Irish highland trail at golden hour, dramatic green hills, adventurous energy.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A dramatic outdoor lifestyle photography shot of a hiker on a mountain trail in the Irish or Scottish highlands. The hiker wears a forest green premium modular 28-litre backpack with Cordura fabric finish and DWR coating — visible water beading on the fabric surface. The trail is rocky and green, surrounded by rolling misty hills. Golden hour light from behind creates a halo effect. The shot is from behind or slight side angle — showing the pack in full. The scene conveys adventure, durability, and the freedom of the trail. Cinematic, editorial, atmospheric. 3:2 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: generic stock photo, white background, cartoon, cheap bag, neon hiking gear, overly bright colours, sunny beach, city, text, watermark
prompts.brand_style_notes: The trail line is for people who run Pyrenees trails on weekends and catch flights on Mondays. Rugged but refined.

prompts.purpose: Visual diagram / flat-lay showing the modular attachment system
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt modular system — base pack with all add-on modules displayed
prompts.short_prompt: Overhead flat-lay of a premium black modular backpack surrounded by detached accessory modules on a dark surface, electric mint lighting accents, editorial product photography.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A precisely composed overhead flat-lay product photography shot. In the centre: a premium black 22-litre modular backpack with Cordura fabric, YKK zippers, and magnetic clip attachment points visible on the front face. Surrounding it in a radial arrangement: eight distinct modular accessories — a phone chest holder, a compact power bank pouch, a rain cover, a shoe compartment, a tech organiser sleeve, a bottle holder, a document sleeve, and a clothing compression module. Each module is positioned with connecting arrows or clean negative space suggesting attachment. The surface is matte dark navy. Subtle electric mint (#3FFFAB) accent lighting from below the surface creates a glow. The arrangement is precise, editorial, and premium. No text. 1:1 square crop. 8K resolution.
prompts.negative_prompt: cartoon, infographic style, text labels on modules, watermark, messy arrangement, cheap plastic accessories, bright white background, amateur lighting
prompts.brand_style_notes: This image needs to explain the entire TrailVolt proposition in one visual. It should feel like a premium gear brand editorial page spread.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Everyday Core Black
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio product shot of a core black 22-litre modular backpack, front-facing, clean light grey background, sharp Cordura fabric texture detail.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A clean e-commerce product photography shot of a premium modular 22-litre backpack in core black. The bag is positioned front-facing with a slight 10-degree rotation. Background is light grey (#F5F5F5) seamless paper. Three-point studio lighting: key light from upper right, fill from left, subtle rim light from behind. The Cordura fabric weave texture is crisp and sharp. YKK zipper pulls are in black. All compartments closed. The pack stands independently, stuffed to natural shape. No props, no distractions. E-commerce quality, product photography. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: lifestyle, person wearing it, outdoor background, cartoon, blurry, low quality, plastic, cheap, text, watermark, over-saturated
prompts.brand_style_notes: Clean e-commerce product shot. Should match the quality of Arc'teryx or Aer product images. Not lifestyle — pure product.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Everyday Slate Grey
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Slate Grey
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio product shot of a slate grey 22-litre modular backpack, front-facing, clean light grey background, sharp fabric texture.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A clean e-commerce product photography shot identical in framing to the core black variant, but the backpack is slate grey — a cool, sophisticated grey with a slightly warm undertone. The same Cordura texture, YKK zippers in charcoal or silver, magnetic module attachment points on the front face. Three-point lighting. Light grey seamless background. Sharp, clean, professional. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: lifestyle, person, outdoor, cartoon, blurry, cheap, text, watermark, black backpack, green backpack
prompts.brand_style_notes: Understated, office-ready. The slate grey communicates versatility — works with any wardrobe, any environment.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Everyday Forest Green (limited edition)
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Forest Green — Limited Edition
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio product shot of a forest green 22-litre modular backpack with a subtle natural element, front-facing, slightly earthy background tone.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A clean e-commerce product photography shot of a premium modular 22-litre backpack in deep forest green (a dark, muted hunter green — not bright lime). The framing matches the core black and slate variants. Background is an off-white with a very subtle warm, earthy undertone to echo the outdoors. A single small sprig of dried eucalyptus or moss-textured surface in the far corner adds a natural hint without overwhelming. YKK zippers in forest green or gunmetal. Limited edition energy: the composition feels slightly more editorial than the standard colourways. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: bright lime green, neon, black backpack, grey backpack, generic, text, watermark, blurry, cheap
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is the limited edition colourway. It should feel slightly more desirable, slightly more editorial than the standard variants.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Travel Core Black
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Black
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio product shot of a core black 30-litre travel backpack, clamshell open position showing interior organisation, clean background.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A clean e-commerce product photography shot of a premium modular 30-litre travel backpack in core black. The bag is shown in a partial clamshell open position — both main compartment halves slightly open to reveal a structured interior with nylon organisation pockets, a padded laptop sleeve, and a packing system. Background is clean light grey. Studio three-point lighting. The pack is structured and holds its shape. Padded back panel and lumbar support visible. All zippers are YKK quality. The bag communicates IATA cabin-compliant travel bag energy. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: lifestyle, person, outdoor, cartoon, blurry, cheap, text, watermark, slate grey, forest green
prompts.brand_style_notes: Travel line buyers are frequent flyers. This image should communicate organisation, efficiency, and premium build quality.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Travel Slate Grey
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Slate Grey
prompts.short_prompt: Premium studio product shot of a slate grey 30-litre travel backpack, front-facing, clean background.
prompts.detailed_prompt: Clean e-commerce product photography of the 30-litre Travel pack in slate grey. Front-facing, slight 10-degree angle. Light grey background. Three-point studio lighting. Ripstop nylon texture visible. All zippers closed — clean, ready-to-pack silhouette. Same quality and consistency as the Travel black variant. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: black backpack, green backpack, lifestyle, person, outdoor, cartoon, blurry, cheap, text, watermark
prompts.brand_style_notes: Consistent product photography across all Travel colourways. Reliability and consistency are brand values.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Trail Core Black
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Core Black
prompts.short_prompt: Premium outdoor product shot of a core black 28-litre trail backpack on rocky ground, DWR water beading visible on fabric, dramatic lighting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A premium product photography shot of a 28-litre trail backpack in core black, made from 500D Cordura nylon with DWR coating. The pack is placed on a flat rocky or slate grey surface. Water droplets bead on the DWR-coated exterior fabric — one or two droplets catching the light. The background is a blurred suggestion of outdoor terrain — rocks, green grass, or mountain path. Studio-quality lighting with a slightly more dramatic, outdoor feel than the Everyday variants. Load-distribution harness and compression straps visible. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: cheap, generic, indoor white background, bright colours, text, watermark, blurry, soft fabric, smooth surface
prompts.brand_style_notes: Trail buyers care about performance. Show the DWR coating, the Cordura texture, the technical details. Premium gear photography.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Trail Forest Green
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green
prompts.short_prompt: Premium outdoor product shot of a forest green 28-litre trail backpack leaning against mossy rock in a forest or highland setting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A premium outdoor product photography shot of a 28-litre trail backpack in deep forest green Cordura fabric. The pack is leaning against a large mossy rock or placed on a weathered wooden hiking trail marker. The background is a blurred green forest or highland environment — soft bokeh of ferns, trees, or heather. The green of the pack harmonises beautifully with the natural surroundings. Dramatic side lighting from a natural source. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: neon green, bright lime, indoor, white background, cartoon, text, watermark, cheap, blurry
prompts.brand_style_notes: The forest green trail pack belongs in nature. The product and environment should feel like they were made for each other.

prompts.purpose: E-commerce product card image — Trail Slate Grey
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Slate Grey
prompts.short_prompt: Premium outdoor product shot of a slate grey 28-litre trail backpack on rocky terrain, technical outdoor gear photography.
prompts.detailed_prompt: Premium product photography of a 28-litre trail pack in slate grey Cordura. Placed on rocky terrain or natural stone surface. Dramatic outdoor lighting — overcast sky quality. DWR fabric texture visible. Load harness, compression straps, hip belt attachment points prominent. Same quality and drama as the Core Black trail variant. 4:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: indoor, white background, cartoon, text, watermark, blurry, cheap, smooth surface, bright colours
prompts.brand_style_notes: Consistent with the trail line aesthetic — technical, durable, performance-focused.

prompts.purpose: Founder portrait in the Dublin design studio
prompts.alt_text: Ruslan, founder of TrailVolt, in the Dublin design studio
prompts.short_prompt: Young male entrepreneur in a design studio surrounded by backpack prototypes and fabric swatches, candid and authentic, warm studio lighting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: An authentic editorial portrait of a young male entrepreneur in his late 20s in a design studio environment. He is at a large worktable covered in fabric swatches (ballistic nylon, Cordura samples), partial backpack prototypes, CAD sketches on paper, and colour chips. His posture is engaged — leaning over the table, examining a zipper pull or stitching detail. Warm studio lighting (Edison bulbs or soft box warm) illuminates him from the side. Behind him on the wall: technical sketches pinned, a mood board with outdoor photography. The studio feels real and lived-in — not a set. The man is dressed in casual smart wear: dark jeans, a clean technical shirt. Cinematic, natural, authentic. No logos or brand text visible. 7:6 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: stock photo style, fake smile, posed corporate look, bright artificial background, cartoon, text, watermark, generic office
prompts.brand_style_notes: Ruslan is the founder — this image is the brand's soul. It should feel real, intelligent, and driven. The product story lives here.

prompts.section: Photo grid — Wicklow Mountains prototype test
prompts.purpose: Founder testing early prototype in Wicklow Mountains
prompts.alt_text: Ruslan testing early TrailVolt prototype in Wicklow Mountains, Ireland
prompts.short_prompt: Young man hiking on misty Irish mountain trail with an early prototype backpack, Wicklow Mountains landscape, overcast atmospheric light.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A candid, slightly grainy documentary-style photograph of a young man in his late 20s hiking on a green Irish mountain trail. He wears a slightly rougher, prototype-looking dark backpack — suggesting it's an early version of what became TrailVolt. The Wicklow Mountains backdrop features rolling green hills, bracken, heather, and a low grey-white mist. The sky is overcast with broken cloud. The lighting is soft, diffuse, and atmospheric. The shot is from slightly behind and to the side, showing the pack and the landscape. The image feels like it was taken in the early days of building the brand — authentic, not polished. Portrait orientation 3:4.
prompts.negative_prompt: sunny beach, tropical, cartoon, bright colours, professional studio, text, watermark, expensive gear, polished product
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is a raw, early-days image. It should feel documentary, not commercial. The brand story starts here.

prompts.section: Photo grid — early workshop prototype table
prompts.purpose: Early prototypes spread on a workshop table
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt early prototypes spread on workshop table
prompts.short_prompt: Overhead shot of a wooden workshop table with early backpack prototypes, fabric samples, buckles, zippers, and handwritten notes, warm maker atmosphere.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A warm, documentary-style overhead or slight angle shot of a wooden workshop table during early product development. Spread across the surface: two or three rough prototype backpack samples in different stages of completion, fabric sample swatches in black and grey Cordura and nylon, an assortment of YKK zipper pulls, Duraflex buckle hardware, spools of thread, and hand-written notebook pages with sketches and measurements. The lighting is warm workshop light — Edison bulb quality. The scene feels like a real maker's workshop, not a staged photo. Portrait orientation 3:4.
prompts.negative_prompt: clean, polished, commercial, digital render, cartoon, text label overlay, bright colours, white background, modern clean desk
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is where TrailVolt was born. Raw, real, maker energy.

prompts.section: Photo grid — Dublin Airport with prototype
prompts.purpose: Founder at Dublin Airport with Travel 30L prototype
prompts.alt_text: Ruslan at Dublin Airport with Travel 30L prototype
prompts.short_prompt: Young man walking through a modern international airport terminal with a modular backpack, morning light from tall terminal windows, purposeful stride.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A candid walking shot of a young man in his late 20s moving through the departures terminal of a modern international airport — the architecture evokes Dublin Airport T1 or T2. Natural morning light streams through tall glass windows. He carries a structured 30-litre modular backpack — the prototype version, slightly less refined than the final product. His stride is purposeful. The background blurs slightly, showing gate signs, benches, other travellers. The shot conveys the exact moment the TrailVolt concept crystallised — watching someone use a modular bag and having the idea. Portrait orientation 3:4.
prompts.negative_prompt: luxury private jet terminal, cartoon, text, watermark, posed, cheesy, bright beach holiday energy, fake smile, generic stock photo
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is the moment of inspiration. It should feel cinematic — like a frame from a travel documentary.

prompts.purpose: Current workshop — materials being stitched, quality in progress
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt workshop — Cordura nylon being precision-stitched
prompts.short_prompt: Close-up of industrial sewing machine stitching ballistic nylon fabric in warm workshop light, hands of a craftsperson guiding the material, quality craftsmanship.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A close-up or medium shot of a craftsperson's hands guiding dark ballistic nylon fabric under an industrial sewing machine needle. The stitch line is straight and precise — double-stitched quality construction. Warm workshop lighting illuminates the fabric texture and the metallic sheen of the machine. In the soft background: a well-organised workshop with fabric rolls, thread spools, and half-finished pack components. The image communicates: every stitch matters. Premium, artisan, quality-driven. 7:6 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: factory assembly line, automated robotic, cartoon, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, synthetic plastic look, white background
prompts.brand_style_notes: TrailVolt is built with obsessive quality. This image is the proof. Six prototyping rounds. Real conditions. Real craft.

prompts.section: Longevity by Design — repair programme visual
prompts.purpose: Repair kit / spare parts visual supporting the lifetime repair programme
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt repair kit — spare parts and lifetime repair programme tools
prompts.short_prompt: Elegant flat-lay of premium backpack spare parts — YKK zipper pulls, Duraflex buckles, thread, and small repair tools on a dark surface with mint accent lighting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A precisely composed flat-lay product photography shot on a matte dark navy surface. Arranged with editorial precision: a set of YKK zipper pulls in black and gunmetal, three Duraflex polypropylene buckles in black, a small spool of matching nylon thread, a compact seam ripper, a curved needle, two small fabric patches in Cordura black, and a typed card that reads 'Lifetime Repair Programme' (subtle, small, minimal). Electric mint accent lighting from the edges creates a cool glow. The arrangement is clean, premium, and intentional. The image says: this brand builds things that last — and backs it up. 7:6 aspect ratio.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered, rusty tools, cheap hardware, bright plastic, cartoon, text-heavy overlay, generic stock photo, colourful craft supplies
prompts.brand_style_notes: Sustainability isn't greenwashing here — it's actual design decisions. This image should feel like a luxury brand's commitment to craft.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Aoife Murphy, Adventure Hiker, Donegal
prompts.alt_text: Aoife Murphy — Adventure Hiker from Donegal, Ireland, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young Irish woman hiking on a dramatic coastal trail, wild Atlantic scenery, TrailVolt trail pack on her back, natural candid expression.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A candid lifestyle portrait in a wide 2:1 crop of a young Irish woman (late 20s, athletic build, dark or auburn hair, practical outdoor clothing) on a coastal hiking trail. The Wild Atlantic Way scenery: dramatic sea cliffs, wild grasses, overcast Atlantic sky. She carries a forest green TrailVolt 28L Trail pack. Her expression is joyful and natural — mid-laugh or mid-conversation with someone off-frame. Golden hour or overcast Irish light. Documentary lifestyle photography style. 2:1 landscape crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: stock photo smile, posed, tropical beach, bright sunshine, cartoon, text, watermark, generic clothing, cheap bag
prompts.brand_style_notes: Tribe members are real people. Aoife does the Wild Atlantic Way with her Trail 28L. She's the Irish adventure archetype.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Marco Lazzarini, Digital Nomad, Barcelona
prompts.alt_text: Marco Lazzarini — Digital Nomad from Barcelona, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young Italian man working on a laptop at a sunny Mediterranean terrace café, TrailVolt travel pack visible, Barcelona architecture in background.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A lifestyle photograph in a 2:1 wide crop of a young Italian man (early 30s, dark hair, light stubble) working on a laptop at an outdoor terrace café in Barcelona or Lisbon. Sunlight filters through cafe awning. A TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Black or Slate pack sits on the chair beside him or under the table. A coffee cup and notebook are on the table. The building behind shows Mediterranean architecture. He is focused, in his element — the definition of location-independent work. Warm Mediterranean light. Editorial lifestyle photography. 2:1 crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: office cubicle, cold grey lighting, fake smile, stock photo, cartoon, text, watermark, rainy weather
prompts.brand_style_notes: Marco is 14 countries in 11 months. His Travel 30L is his office and his wardrobe. The image should radiate freedom and focus.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Sarah Kim, Product Designer, Dublin
prompts.alt_text: Sarah Kim — Product Designer in Dublin, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young East Asian woman cycling or walking along Dublin canal with a TrailVolt everyday pack, morning commute energy, Georgian Dublin architecture.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A candid lifestyle photograph in a 2:1 wide crop of a young East Asian woman (late 20s, product designer aesthetic — fashionable but practical) cycling or walking briskly along a Dublin canal (Grand Canal or Royal Canal) in the morning. She wears a TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black on her back. Dublin Georgian red-brick buildings and canal reflections in the background. Early morning light, slightly cool. Her expression is alert and energised. She's heading somewhere with purpose — gym, office, or both. Editorial lifestyle photography style. 2:1 crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: generic city, Tokyo, New York, tropical, cartoon, text, watermark, posed, stock photo smile, heavy winter coat
prompts.brand_style_notes: Gym at 6am, office by 9, dinner at 7. Sarah proves the Everyday pack lives up to its name.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Tomás Rivera, Trail Runner, Pamplona
prompts.alt_text: Tomás Rivera — Trail Runner from Pamplona, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young Spanish man mid-run on a Pyrenees mountain trail with TrailVolt trail pack, dramatic mountain landscape, dynamic motion, golden hour.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A dynamic action lifestyle photograph in 2:1 wide crop of a young Spanish man (late 20s, athletic, trail runner physique) mid-stride on a rocky Pyrenees mountain trail. He wears trail running gear and a TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green or Core Black. The Pyrenees peaks are dramatic and partially cloud-covered in the background. Golden hour light from one side. The shot has motion energy — slightly blurred legs, sharp upper body. His expression is focused and determined. Cinematic outdoor action photography. 2:1 crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: city road running, flat terrain, indoor treadmill, cartoon, text, watermark, casual strolling, bright neon running gear
prompts.brand_style_notes: Tomás runs trails on weekends and catches flights on Mondays. The pack has to work for both. He's the athletic performance archetype.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Nadia Voronova, Freelance Developer, Amsterdam
prompts.alt_text: Nadia Voronova — Freelance Developer in Amsterdam, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young woman at canal-side Amsterdam café with laptop and TrailVolt pack, Dutch architecture, focused and creative, warm interior or terrace light.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A candid editorial photograph in 2:1 wide crop of a young Eastern European woman (late 20s / early 30s, developer aesthetic — casual but smart) at a cosy canal-side café in Amsterdam. She has a laptop open, headphones around her neck, and a TrailVolt Everyday or Travel pack on the chair or floor beside her. The café window shows Amsterdam canal and Dutch architecture — narrow brick buildings, bicycles, water. The lighting is warm and slightly golden — afternoon in Amsterdam. She looks focused and at ease. Real, authentic, not posed. 2:1 crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: stock photo, fake smile, bright sun beach, cartoon, text, watermark, corporate office
prompts.brand_style_notes: Nadia voted on the Power Bank Module before it launched. She's invested in the brand. The image should feel like community membership.

prompts.purpose: Tribe member portrait — James Thornton, Architect, London
prompts.alt_text: James Thornton — Architect in London, TrailVolt Tribe member
prompts.short_prompt: Young British man on London Bridge or Southbank with TrailVolt Everyday pack, sophisticated urban aesthetic, overcast London sky, architectural setting.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A sophisticated editorial lifestyle photograph in 2:1 wide crop of a young British man (early 30s, architect aesthetic — smart and architectural in his style) standing or walking near London Bridge, Tower Bridge, or the Tate Modern on the Southbank. He carries a TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black or Slate. The London sky is beautifully overcast — that signature grey English light. Thames visible or implied in background. The architecture is clean and powerful. He looks confident and considered. Editorial style, slightly fashion-adjacent. 2:1 crop.
prompts.negative_prompt: sunny tourist London, Big Ben cliché, cartoon, text, watermark, stock photo, fake smile, cheap clothing
prompts.brand_style_notes: James has had the same pack for 18 months and it looks better now than when he bought it. Premium longevity is the message.

prompts.purpose: Open Graph social media preview image for the homepage
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt — One Pack. Every Horizon. Premium modular backpacks.
prompts.short_prompt: Premium wide banner showing TrailVolt Core Pack product on dark navy background with electric mint tagline text, magazine advertisement quality.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A wide 1200x630 social media preview image with a dark navy (#0B1626) background. On the right side: the TrailVolt Core Pack in core black, lit dramatically with a subtle mint glow from behind. On the left side: bold typography (not literal font, suggest via description) — 'One Pack.' in large white text, 'Every Horizon.' in electric mint (#3FFFAB). Below: 'TrailVolt' wordmark and a three-line sub-note showing the three lines: Everyday · Travel · Trail. The overall composition is wide, premium, and confident. Magazine-quality graphic design sensibility. Flat design meets product photography. 1200x630px.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered, low-res feel, amateur design, bright flashy colours, rainbow gradients, too much text, cartoon, watermark
prompts.brand_style_notes: This is the brand's first impression on social media when shared. It must be unmistakably premium and immediately communicate the product.

prompts.section: Social preview — shop page OG image
prompts.purpose: Open Graph social media preview image for the shop page
prompts.alt_text: TrailVolt Shop — Everyday, Travel, and Trail pack lines
prompts.short_prompt: Wide banner showing three TrailVolt packs (Everyday, Travel, Trail) side by side on dark background, 'Shop the Full System' energy.
prompts.detailed_prompt: A wide 1200x630 product banner image. Three premium modular backpacks arranged side by side on a dark navy background with individual mint accent rim lighting: Everyday 22L Core Black (left), Travel 30L Slate (centre), Trail 28L Forest Green (right). Each pack is labelled beneath with its name in clean minimal typography. The headline area at the top left reads 'Shop the Full System' in white. The composition is symmetrical and premium — like a top-tier gear brand's shop banner. 1200x630px.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered, text-heavy, amateur, cartoon, watermark, bright white background, cheap bags
prompts.brand_style_notes: All three lines. One image. The full TrailVolt ecosystem at a glance.
